summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IAM User Management and App Launcher features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: App Launcher with Zoho-style UI, search functionality, SAML Apps user management modal, and direct app launch with token.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span inside option element - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Refex admin login (gowtham.s@refex.co.in / Admin123!)
Refex user login (suriya.v@refex.co.in / Admin123!)
Acme admin login (admin@acme.com / Admin123!)
GET /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users - returns assigned users
POST /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users - assigns users to app
DELETE /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users/{user_id} - removes user from app
org_admin always sees apps in launcher (bypass access control)
Assigned user sees app in launcher
Unassigned user (without role) does NOT see app in launcher
Launcher apps returns correct data structure
SAML complete endpoint works with token
SAML complete without token redirects to login
SAML apps list includes approved_user_ids field
Org users available for dropdown
App Launcher UI: Welcome header with user name
App Launcher UI: Search bar filters apps
App Launcher UI: Apps grid with Kissflow app
SAML Apps: User management modal opens
SAML Apps: Assign user dropdown present
SAML Apps: Assigned users list shows users
SAML Apps: Test SSO generates signed SAML response
App Launch: Clicking app calls /api/saml/{app_id}/complete with token directly
critical_code_review_comments: Access control works correctly - users can access apps via: 1) org_admin role, 2) direct assignment (approved_user_ids), 3) group membership (allowed_group_ids), 4) role assignment (allowed_role_ids)
Note: suriya.v user has Administrator role which grants access via allowed_role_ids - this is expected behavior
seed_data_creation: Reset suriya.v@refex.co.in password to Admin123! (was different)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All IAM features working correctly. Key points: 1) Access control checks org_admin role, approved_user_ids, allowed_group_ids, and allowed_role_ids. 2) suriya.v has Administrator role which grants access via allowed_role_ids. 3) App Launcher has Zoho-style UI with welcome header, search, and icon grid. 4) User management modal on SAML Apps page allows assigning/removing users. 5) App launch directly calls /api/saml/{app_id}/complete?token=... without intermediate SSO page.

verified_features.app_launcher_ui: Welcome header with user name, search bar, icon grid - all working
verified_features.access_control: Only assigned users (via direct assignment, groups, or roles) see apps. org_admin always sees apps
verified_features.user_management_modal: Purple users icon opens modal with assigned users list and add dropdown
verified_features.app_launch: Clicking app directly calls /api/saml/{app_id}/complete with token (no intermediate SSO page)
